title: tinus rugosus
intro: Tinus rugosus, also known as Mountain Tea, is a medicinal plant native to the Mediterranean region, characterized by its grayish-green leaves and small white flowers. The plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include antimicrobial, anti-inflammatory, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Tinus rugosus are attributed to its ability to soothe digestive issues, reduce stress and anxiety, and boost the immune system. Herbal preparations of Tinus rugosus include teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be consumed to reap its medicinal benefits.
